meta.name: Keeping Up With The Lanes
meta.description:
"Move over Hollywood, the Lanes have arrived. Keeping Up With The Lanes is an unfiltered, unscripted reality show  into the life of Blossom Lane, the 12-year-old CEO and music prodigy taking over the industry.

This isn't a cartoon—this is real life. Cameras follow Blossom, her sister Chance, and her creative partner Stormi as they build a multi-million dollar empire from their glass-walled penthouse. From the tension of recording the 'Manual Magic' vocals to the high-stakes pressure of launching a global brand, see what it really takes to be the youngest boss in the game. In a world of scripts, Blossom Lane is writing her own rules. Can you keep up?"
